description:
This quiz assesses advanced HTML5 knowledge, particularly semantic elements, with a challenging yet engaging tone that balances technical rigor and humor. It targets intermediate to advanced web developers to evaluate their ability to move beyond basic tags like `<div>` and `<span>`.
Topics: Semantic HTML5 elements, Advanced HTML5 features, HTML structure best practices
Audience: Web developers with intermediate HTML knowledge seeking to validate or enhance their proficiency in semantic markup.
